allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys comments = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for c in comments: print\(f""--- Inline Comment by @{c[''user''][''login'']} ---""\) print\(f""File: {c[''path'']}, Line: {c.get\(''line'', c.get\(''original_line'', ''N/A''\)\)}""\) print\(f""Body: {c[''body'']}""\) print\(\) ")

Bash(gh api repos/pkscout/script.artistslideshow/pulls/87 --jq '{state: .state, title: .title, merged: .merged, mergeable: .mergeable, mergeable_state: .mergeable_state, draft: .draft, created_at: .created_at, updated_at: .updated_at, closed_at: .closed_at, merged_at: .merged_at, user: .user.login, base: .base.ref, head: .head.ref}')
Bash(gh api repos/pkscout/script.artistslideshow/issues/87/comments --jq '.[] | {id: .id, user: .user.login, created_at: .created_at, updated_at: .updated_at, body: .body}')
Bash(gh api repos/pkscout/script.artistslideshow/pulls/87/reviews --jq '.[] | {id: .id, user: .user.login, state: .state, submitted_at: .submitted_at, body: .body}')
Bash(gh api repos/pkscout/script.artistslideshow/pulls/87/comments --jq '.[] | {id: .id, user: .user.login, created_at: .created_at, updated_at: .updated_at, path: .path, line: .line, body: .body}')
